title: Verify Engagement Section Logic: Trailer autoplay
description: Tests the specific logic in the Engagement section where a trailer autoplays if the user has completed more than 90% of their previously acquired content.
preconditions: User has an active trial and is in the target cohort.
User has acquired content and watched >90% of it.
expected_result: The section should display the top recommended content in a similar genre, and its trailer should begin playing automatically. The 'trial-corner-topcontent-played' event should be fired with 'autoplay' as an attribute.
